hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-black
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-medium text-black

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris). Generous asymmetrical spacing. Content padded generously inside bordered containers.
layout.border_radius: rounded-3xl for major containers, rounded-full for buttons and pills

header.description: Sticky crystal glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5). Custom logo on left (SATIVO with Play-icon 'A'), navigation center, 'Let's Talk' CTA on right.
header.interactions: Nav links have subtle #1A6BFF underline expand on hover.

hero.description: Immersive landing with fixed parallax background. Headline 'SATIVO STUDIOS' and 'Complete Web & Digital Solutions'. Followed by a single, beautifully typeset paragraph detailing services.
hero.animations: Framer Motion staggered character/word reveal for headings. Smooth parallax scroll for background.

portfolio.description: Two premium 'Apple-style' bento cards. Default state shows sleek thumbnail and title.
portfolio.interactions: Hover 1: Thumbnail scales slightly, image reveals web interface. Hover 2: Crystal glass pane slides up revealing deep description with features. Future-ready 'Show more works' button at the bottom.

about.description: Enthusiastic narrative detailing the startup's energy. Large typography, split layout.
about.visuals: Parallax background transitioning smoothly into a geometric blue/white abstract.

contact.description: Clean, highly accessible form. Name, Phone, Message fields.
contact.buttons: Primary CTA 'Send via Gmail' (mailto), Secondary CTA 'Send via WhatsApp' (wa.me) featuring Lucide icons.
contact.styling: Inputs use Shadcn but overridden with rounded-xl, 1px solid border, soft focus rings in #1A6BFF.

images.description: Clean white abstract architecture. Use as a fixed background with parallax scrolling.
Minimalist blue and white geometric abstract. Use as a fixed background for the About section.
Modern interior lighting. Use as a parallax background behind the contact form.
Desk monitor setup to simulate an iframe/preview of a web dev project.
Sleek office setup for the second portfolio piece.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for complex animations and parallax effects.
Logo Creation: Create a custom SVG component for 'SATIVO'. The letter 'A' MUST be replaced by a right-pointing triangle (play icon) colored #1A6BFF.
Hero Section: The services description MUST be a single, elegant, large paragraph. NO BULLET POINTS.

Parallax Scroll: Place background images in fixed position containers with z-index behind content. Use Framer Motion 'useScroll' and 'useTransform' to create a cinematic Apple-style parallax effect as the user scrolls through the sections.

Portfolio Interactions: Cards should show image/title by default. On hover, trigger a Framer Motion animation to reveal a glassmorphic overlay containing the feature description. Add a 'Show more works' outline button below the grid.
Contact Form: Implement two submit actions. 1) Gmail/Mailto button. 2) WhatsApp (wa.me) button.
Accessibility: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements, buttons, and form inputs.
